steps.prompt:
Review the Phase 1 + Phase 2 implementation of the 'lair-health' Lair mini app.

Read ALL files under /Users/bugbookee/Desktop/ai/lair/lair-app-v2/apps/lair-health/ and evaluate quality.

Key files to check:
- package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json — scaffold correctness
- src/main.tsx — LairMiniAppClient init, ready() call, auth from bridge
- src/App.tsx — routing
- src/lib/lairClient.ts — SDK singleton
- src/lib/storage.ts — localStorage wrapper
- src/services/api.ts — fetch wrapper, 401 refresh, NetworkError
- src/services/medicationApi.ts — ported from mobile, types complete
- src/services/mealApi.ts — meal CRUD
- src/store/medicationStore.ts, mealStore.ts, uiStore.ts — Zustand v5
- src/hooks/useSession.ts, useMedications.ts, useMeals.ts
- src/theme/tokens.ts, global.css
- src/i18n/ko.json (40+ keys), i18n.ts
- src/components/OfflineBanner.tsx, ErrorBoundary.tsx

Score each 0-10:
1. Lair SDK compliance — LairMiniAppClient used correctly, ready() in main.tsx, auth from bridge initData
2. TypeScript strictness — no implicit any, correct types throughout
3. React 19 patterns — proper hooks, no legacy anti-patterns
4. Architecture quality — clean service/store/hook separation, no circular deps
5. Code completeness — no empty stubs, no TODO comments, all files populated

For each issue:
- Severity: CRITICAL / WARN / NOTE
- File
- Problem
- Fix

Output:
## Score: X/10
## Verdict: PASS / FAIL (8+ = PASS)
## Critical Issues
## Warnings
## Summary
